Ntc Of Petition And Mtn And Petition And Mtn To 1) Compel Contractual Arbitration And 2) Stay All Proceedings
Off Calendar May-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL J. BETZ OF ALLEN MATKINS LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 273-7453 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE. ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER AT 9:38 A.M., THERE IS STILL NO APPEARANCE FROM THE OPPOSING PARTY, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANTS SUNTECH ENERGY SOLUTIONS, INC AND SUNTECH AMERICA, INCORPORATED'S Petition And Motion To 1) Compel Contractual Arbitration And 2) Stay All Proceedings IS GRANTED. ARBITRATION IS COMPELLED AND THIS ACTION IS STAYED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
